entries.definition:
كتاب النون

ندب - ندح

(نذر) النون والذال والراء كلمةٌ تدل على تخويف أو تخوُّف. منه الإنذار: الإبلاغ؛ ولا يكاد يكون إلاَّ في التَّخويف. وتناذَرُوا: خَوَّفَ بعضُهم بعضاً. ومنه النَّذْر، وهو أنّه يَخافُ إذا أخلَفَ. قال ثعلب: نَذِرْتُ بهم فاستعدَدت لهم وحَذِرتُ منهم. والنّذِير: المُنْذِر، والجمع النُّذُر. والنَّذْر أيضاً: ما يجب، كأنَّه نُذِر، أي أُوجِب. ونَذْر المُوضِحة في الحديث منه .

تَنَادَى tanādā [v. VI intrans.] to call to one another, to call upon
one another (68:21) فَتَنَادَوْا مُصْبِحِينَ so they called each other at
day-break.

نَادٍ nādī [n.] 1 council, assembly (29:29) وَتَأْتُونَ فِي نَادِيكُمُ الْمُنْكَرَ
and you commit evil in your gathering place 2 supporters (96:17–
18) فَلْيَدْعُ نَادِيَهُ سَنَدْعُ الزَّبَانِيَةَ let him summon his comrades—We will
summon the overseers of Hell.

نِدَاء nidāʾ I [v.n.] the act of calling (19:3) إِذْ نَادَى رَبَّهُ نِدَاءً خَفِيًّا
when he called to his Lord inaudibly [lit. with inaudible calling]
II [n.] a shout, a call (2:171) وَمَثَلُ الَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا كَمَثَلِ الَّذِي يَنْعِقُ بِمَا
لَا يَسْمَعُ إِلَّا دُعَاءً وَنِدَاءً [calling to] those who disbelieve is like [the calling of
one] who shrieks to a dumb animal [lit. one who hears nothing
but a shout and cry].

نَدِيّ nadiyy [n.] assemblage, gathering (19:73) أَيُّ الْفَرِيقَيْنِ خَيْرٌ مَقَامًا
وَأَحْسَنُ نَدِيًّا which of the two sides is better situated and has the
better gathering?

مُنَادٍ munādī [act. part.] crier, one who calls, preacher (3:193)
رَبَّنَا إِنَّنَا سَمِعْنَا مُنَادِيًا يُنَادِي لِلْإِيمَانِ our Lord!, we have heard a caller
calling [people] to the belief [the Faith].

تَنَادٍ tanādī [v. n.] the act of calling out to one another
*(40:32) يَوْمَ التَّنَادِ the Day of calling out [to one another in
distress or to the Reckoning].

one another (68:21) فَتَنَادَوْا مُصْبِحِينَ so they called each other at

رَبَّنَا إِنَّنَا سَمِعْنَا مُنَادِيًا يُنَادِي لِلْإِيمَانِ our Lord!, we have heard a caller

*(40:32) يَوْمَ التَّنَادِ the Day of calling out [to one another in
distress or to the Reckoning].

entries.definition:
n–dh–r vow, to pledge to God, to pledge, to consecrate, votive
offering; to warn, to threaten, to admonish, to denote; harbinger,
herald. Of this root, 11 forms occur in 130 places in the Qur’an:
نَذَرَ nadhara three times; أَنْذَرَ ʾandhara 41 times; أُنْذِرَ ʾundhira four
times; نَذْر nadhr twice; نُذُور nudhūr once; نُذْر nudhr once; نَذِير
nadhīr 44 times; نُذُر nudhur 14 times; مُنْذِر mundhir five times;
مُنْذِرُون mundhirūn 10 times and مُنْذَرُون mundharūn five times.

نَذَرَ nadhara i [v. trans.] 1 to vow (19:26) إِنِّي نَذَرْتُ لِلرَّحْمَنِ صَوْمًا I
have vowed to the Lord of Mercy a fast 2 to dedicate, to pledge;
(3:35) رَبِّ إِنِّي نَذَرْتُ لَكَ مَا فِي بَطْنِي مُحَرَّرًا Lord, I have dedicated what
is in my womb entirely to You.

926
entries.definition_english:
n–dh–r vow, to pledge to God, to pledge, to consecrate, votive
offering; to warn, to threaten, to admonish, to denote; harbinger,
herald. Of this root, 11 forms occur in 130 places in the Qur’an:
نَذَرَ nadhara three times; أَنْذَرَ ʾandhara 41 times; أُنْذِرَ ʾundhira four
times; نَذْر nadhr twice; نُذُور nudhūr once; نُذْر nudhr once; نَذِير
nadhīr 44 times; نُذُر nudhur 14 times; مُنْذِر mundhir five times;
مُنْذِرُون mundhirūn 10 times and مُنْذَرُون mundharūn five times.

نَذَرَ nadhara i [v. trans.] 1 to vow (19:26) إِنِّي نَذَرْتُ لِلرَّحْمَنِ صَوْمًا I
have vowed to the Lord of Mercy a fast 2 to dedicate, to pledge;
(3:35) رَبِّ إِنِّي نَذَرْتُ لَكَ مَا فِي بَطْنِي مُحَرَّرًا Lord, I have dedicated what
is in my womb entirely to You.

926

entries.definition:
أَنْذَرَ ʾandhara [v. IV] I [intrans.] to give warning, to carry out
the act of warning (74:2) قُمْ فَأَنْذِرْ arise and warn II [trans.] 1 to
warn (26:214) وَأَنْذِرْ عَشِيرَتَكَ الْأَقْرَبِينَ and warn the nearest of your
kinfolk 2 to proclaim, to declare (16:2) أَنْ أَنْذِرُوا أَنَّهُ لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا أَنَا declare
that there is no god but Me 3 to preach, to guide, to admonish
(6:19) وَأُوحِيَ إِلَيَّ هَذَا الْقُرْآنُ لِأُنْذِرَكُمْ بِهِ وَمَنْ بَلَغَ and this Qur’an was
revealed to me that with it I may warn you and everyone it
reaches III [doubly trans.] to warn against (41:13) أَنْذَرْتُكُمْ صَاعِقَةً مِثْلَ
صَاعِقَةِ عَادٍ وَثَمُودَ I have warned you about a blast like the one of
[which struck] ʿād and Thamūd.

أُنْذِرَ ʾundhira [pass. v. IV] 1 to be guided, to be admonished
(14:52) هَذَا بَلَاغٌ لِلنَّاسِ وَلِيُنْذَرُوا بِهِ this is a message to humankind; let
them be guided thereby 2 to be warned (46:3) وَالَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا عَمَّا أُنْذِرُوا
مُعْرِضُونَ yet those who disbelieve turn away from that against
which they have been warned.

نَذْر nadhr [n., pl. نُذُور nudhūr] vow, pledge to God (2:270) وَمَا
أَنْفَقْتُمْ مِنْ نَفَقَةٍ أَوْ نَذَرْتُمْ مِنْ نَذْرٍ فَإِنَّ اللَّهَ يَعْلَمُهُ whatever donations you
contribute or pledges you make, God surely knows it.

نُذْر nudhr [v. n.] the act of warning (77:5–6) فَالْمُلْقِيَاتِ ذِكْرًا عُذْرًا أَوْ
نُذْرًا that which delivers a message to excuse or to warn.

نَذِير nadhīr [n./act. part., pl. نُذُر nudhur] 1 warner, preacher/that
which warns (25:1) تَبَارَكَ الَّذِي نَزَّلَ الْفُرْقَانَ عَلَى عَبْدِهِ لِيَكُونَ لِلْعَالَمِينَ نَذِيرًا
exalted is He who has sent down the Differentiator to His servant
that it/he may be to all beings a warner 2 a warning (67:17)
فَسَتَعْلَمُونَ كَيْفَ نَذِيرِ you will come to know what My warning means.

مُنْذِر mundhir [n.; act. part., pl. مُنْذِرُون mundhirūn] 1 warning,
admonishing (79:45) إِنَّمَا أَنْتَ مُنْذِرُ مَنْ يَخْشَاهَا you are only warning
those who stand in awe of it 2 a warner (38:65) قُلْ إِنَّمَا أَنَا مُنْذِرٌ
[Prophet] say, ‘I am but a warner.’

مُنْذَر mundhar [pass. part., pl. مُنْذَرُون mundharūn] one who is
warned or admonished (27:58) فَسَاءَ مَطَرُ الْمُنْذَرِينَ how dreadful that
rain was for those who had been warned.
